MLB Pipeline Based Prospect Reports

MLB Prospect Dashboard by Max Buschle

All 30 organizations, each club's top 10 prospects, team-colored navigation, real baseball-stat tool charts, and scouting-style player reports.

Contact: 239-451-1292 | mbuschle627@gmail.com

Filters

Optional: upload your completed CSV later and the dashboard will rebuild from it.

This build is designed to open by double-clicking index.html. No Terminal or npm needed.

Project Goal

Every organization. Top 10 prospects. One scouting-style report system.

The dashboard is built around organization top-10 prospect lists, MLB Pipeline/MiLB profile fields, current level/affiliate context, 2026 prospect stat fields, and your report format. The charts are built to read like baseball evaluation data with exit velocity, hard-hit rate, barrel rate, contact, whiff, chase, fastball velocity, spin, zone rate, strike rate, and command indicators.
